market_notes: WA commercial construction market is firm with healthcare and data centre activity leading. Skilled labour shortage continues to push contractors to compete on PM and Site Manager roles. Watch the Westport development pipeline for late-2026 tender drops.

top_3_today.headline: Built wins $180M Murdoch Health Campus expansion
top_3_today.why_it_matters: Big healthcare build with 200+ workforce ramp from Q3 2026. They've already opened 3 PM/SM postings in 14 days.
top_3_today.best_first_action: Reach out to Built's WA Operations Manager Sarah Tully on LinkedIn — reference Murdoch win and your healthcare PM bench.

top_3_today.headline: Doric ramping up Joondalup mixed-use
top_3_today.why_it_matters: Recent $90M contract award + 4 fresh roles in the last 10 days. Site Foreman + Estimator visible.
top_3_today.best_first_action: Email Doric's Pre-construction Manager with two pre-vetted Estimators.

top_3_today.headline: DA approval — 8-storey Subiaco office (Hesperia)
top_3_today.why_it_matters: Tender invites expected May–June. Builders bidding will need quick PM bench.
top_3_today.best_first_action: Cold call top 5 likely tenderers (Multiplex, Built, ADCO, Georgiou, Doric) and offer pre-bid PM CVs.

hiring_signals.why_hot: Just won Murdoch ($180M). 3 PM/SM job posts in 14 days. Talking to recruiters about a Senior Estimator search.
hiring_signals.outreach_hook: Hi Sarah — saw the Murdoch win. I've placed 4 healthcare PMs in WA in the last 18 months — happy to share a bench overview.

hiring_signals.why_hot: Joondalup ramp-up + 4 fresh roles. Foreman role open 21 days = warm.
hiring_signals.outreach_hook: Noticed your Foreman ad has been live a few weeks — got 2 Foremen with mixed-use experience available next month.

hiring_signals.why_hot: NextDC P3 data centre. National firm growing WA office.
hiring_signals.outreach_hook: WA data centre work is heating up — keen to share who's available with hyperscale build experience.

hiring_signals.why_hot: Tendering Bentley TAFE. Posted Estimator role last week.
hiring_signals.outreach_hook: Saw the Estimator post — I have an QS/Estimator with TAFE/education experience available.
Quick check-in on your retail pipeline — happy to share Site Managers with recent fitout experience.

watchlist_status.note: Tendering Subiaco office, finalising Burswood interior fitout.
Murdoch win + 3 fresh roles in 14 days.
Bentley TAFE tender, Estimator role open.

pipeline.project_name: Westport Stage 1 logistics precinct — warehouse pad release
pipeline.why_it_matters_for_recruiters: Georgiou just won this — Project Director and Site Manager hiring typically opens 4-8 weeks post-award. Get CVs in front of their pre-con team this month.
Anchor tenant secured — financing finalisation likely Q3 2026, then tender. Reach out to top 5 likely tenderers (Multiplex, Built, ADCO, BGC, Doric) ahead of bid.
DA cleared — tender package likely out within 8-10 weeks. Education-experienced PM/SM bench should be primed for the likely shortlist (PACT, BGC, Built).
